rules.text: Every public project must have a clear CTA flow.
Every service or product page must have SEO metadata.
Every project must support organic social post generation.
Every launch or update should create social-ready content.
Every pricing page must use a conversion-focused layout.
Every project must track analytics readiness signals.
Every project must keep a professional brand voice.
Never publish marketing content without brand/logo verification.
Never publish campaigns with failed CTA link probes.
Never post duplicate campaigns for the same platform and week.
Never bypass publish verification before marking live.
Auto-pause marketing workflows when publish verification fails.
